notes: The file assembles Piece 9 (inertiaDeg = 1 over alg-closed fields) and the unconditional T-II-2-009 fiber-count theorem; it is not imported by any other Lean file in the project (only referenced in doc comments). The IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.under definition placed in _root_ is a likely near-duplicate of Mathlib's HeightOneSpectrum.comap. The large unconditional theorem carries set_option maxHeartbeats 2000000 without a justifying comment.
